description:
Schedule, manage and analyze Fediverse accounts on any FediSuite instance FediSuite is an open platform for the Fediverse: schedule posts, automatically split long posts into threads, get notifications from all your accounts in one place, and manage multiple accounts across 20+ platforms, including Mastodon, Pixelfed, PeerTube, Misskey, Friendica, WordPress (via the ActivityPub plugin) and BizzFed. The whole stack is open source under the GPL-3.0, with no Google Play and no tracking. Official website: https://www.fedisuite.com To use this app you first need an account on a FediSuite instance. A list of public instances that accept new registrations is available at https://www.fedisuite.com/instances. You can also run your own instance, the server source code is freely available too. The Android app This is a real native Android client, not a WebView wrapper and not a shrunk-down desktop clone. It connects to the FediSuite instance you choose and brings your whole setup to your phone:
  • Keep an eye on multiple Fediverse accounts from one dashboard
  • Write posts, attach media and alt text, and schedule them for the right time
  • Split long posts into threads automatically, at paragraph, sentence or word boundaries
  • Review, edit or repost your queue of scheduled, published and failed posts
  • Track follower growth, engagement rates and best posting times in compact mobile analytics
  • Read notifications from supported accounts right inside the app, no need to jump between instances
  • Connect, disconnect and manage accounts
  • Use the admin area if your account has the right permissions on that instance
Built for touchscreens: large tap targets, cards instead of tables, dark mode by default. No Google Play required, no tracking, no ads. License: GPL-3.0.
